task_completion.description: Verify the HospitalRun application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun web interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the settings or administration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Settings, Administration, or Clinic Configuration page is displayed in HospitalRun.

task_completion.description: Verify the Hospital Name has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Grand Oak Community Hospital' is entered into the Hospital Name input field (replacing 'City General Hospital').

task_completion.description: Verify the Hospital Email has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'admin@grandoak.org' is entered into the Hospital Email input field (replacing 'admin@citygeneral.org').
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Update', or similar confirmation button, or a success notification/toast appears confirming the settings were saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made within the HospitalRun web application, not via terminal commands, curl, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into the actual HospitalRun form fields, not a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the page text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial hospital name is 'City General Hospital' and the initial email is 'admin@citygeneral.org'. The expected final state is Hospital Name: 'Grand Oak Community Hospital' and Hospital Email: 'admin@grandoak.org'.
